_comment: GOLDEN VECTOR for the DiLoCo commit-reveal commitment. Duplicated VERBATIM in packages/coordinator/src/domain/entities/__tests__/diloco-commitment-golden-vector.json. Both packages pin `expectedCommitment` in their own test suite; if EITHER side drifts its canonicalJSON / aggregationInvariantEnvelope / computeCommitment, that side's suite fails. DO NOT edit one copy without editing the other (a deliberate divergence indicates a real consensus break).
